subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! The One, the Single, the Alone remembereth thee from His glorious station and testifieth, even as He testified aforetime, that He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد یذکرک الفرد الواحد الاحد من مقامه المحمود و یشهد کما شهد من قبل انه
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
